introSection: Lightning Coaster (Japanese: ライトニングコースター) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Nasu Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan. The ride was manufactured by Meisho Amusement Machines and designed by Anton Schwarzkopf.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Lightning Coaster on the parks website (Japanese)

fullText:
Lightning Coaster (Japanese: ライトニングコースター) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Nasu Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan. The ride was manufactured by Meisho Amusement Machines and designed by Anton Schwarzkopf.



Black track and white supports.




 * Lightning Coaster on the parks website (Japanese)
